description: In secretx-k8s/src/lib.rs lines 82-85, map_kube_error maps is_forbidden() (HTTP 403) to SecretError::Unavailable. This is wrong: 403 is a permanent RBAC misconfiguration. Any caller using Unavailable as a retry signal will loop forever without resolution. All other backends (azure-kv, gcp-sm, aws-sm, hashicorp-vault, doppler) map 403 to SecretError::Backend (permanent). The fix is to change is_forbidden() arm to SecretError::Backend.
title: k8s: 403 Forbidden mapped to Unavailable instead of Backend
